You are a developer migrating from Git to Jujutsu (jj). You have a repository at `/home/user/project` with some tracked files that should actually be ignored. In jj, untracking a file that is already tracked and adding it to `.gitignore` requires specific steps. Your task: 1. Navigate to `/home/user/project`. 2. Output the commit ID of the `ignore-cleanup` bookmark to `/home/user/project/bookmark_commit.txt`. Ensure that the working copy is correctly ignoring the files and that they are not tracked in the current revision.
